AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Planning a lunchbox treat? Reach for Arnott's Tiny Teddy Chocolate Multipack Biscuits. Its real cocoa makes it a delicious and convenient choice. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Arnott's Tiny Teddy Chocolate Biscuits Multipack brings the beloved Tiny Teddies flavour in perfectly portioned packs. Treat the little ones to chocolatey goodness in biscuit form—ideal for school snacks, playtime, or a sweet treat any time of day!

Perfect for playtime or snack time, Arnott’s Tiny Teddy Chocolate Biscuits are the ideal surprise treat for kids and adults alike. This multipack features 8 perfectly portioned packs of rich cocoa-flavoured Tiny Teddies, making them just the right size for a sweet snack. Whether it’s for school snacks, lunchboxes, or an afternoon pick-me-up, these chocolatey biscuits & cookies are a hit with the whole family.

With their irresistible chocolate flavour and adorable Tiny Teddies shape, these biscuits are a fun and convenient multipack option for on-the-go snacks or a delightful treat any time of day. Stock up and share the joy of Tiny Teddies!
 

8 convenient individual packs of Tiny Teddies

A family favourite

No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

There is no substitute

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Red Tip Bananas are great for breakfast and snacking occasions and are the perfect lunchbox addition. 

How to Pick:
Bananas that are yellow and lightly flecked with brown spots will be at their peak flavor. Bananas should be plump, firm, and brightly colored.

How to Store:
Store bananas at room temperature, where they will continue to ripen. If you refrigerate your bananas, they will stop ripening, but this will also make the skins go black. The fruit is still okay to eat, but will not be the best quality.

Where it's Grown:
Australian Red Tip Bananas are grown in Far North Queensland, near Innisfail.

Health Benefits:
Bananas contain potassium for heathy muscle function, and are high in energy-supprting vitamin B6* 

*Based on one large cavendish banana, or 2 medium lady finger bananas (150g), as part of a healthy balanced diet

<section><header>How to Pick:</header> Choose apples that are firm and feel heavy for their size. Look for smooth, unblemished skin.

</section>

</section>

</section>

<section><header>Where it's Grown:</header> Grown with care in Australia.

</section>
